title: 5PC Brad Point Wood Drill Bit Set – 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm & 10mm – Carbon Steel Drill Bits for DIY, Furniture Repairs & Woodworking (5pc Drill Set)
features: This set includes 5 of the most common drill bit sizes: 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm, and 10mm. With these options, you’ll be covered for a wide range of small DIY and woodworking tasks such as fitting dowels, shelf supports, or pilot holes for screws

Each bit has a brad point tip that helps position the drill exactly where you want it. The sharp point reduces wandering on flat surfaces, making it easier to start clean holes and achieve neater results in wood and plastics

Manufactured from carbon steel, these drill bits are built for general household and workshop use. They offer dependable strength for light to medium jobs, making them a practical and affordable choice for most DIY users

Best used with a standard power drill, these bits are designed for drilling into softwoods, hardwoods, and some plastics. They’re ideal for everyday tasks like furniture repairs, craft projects, or assembling shelving units

Each package includes 5 wood drill bits made from carbon steel, featuring a practical range of sizes, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm, and 10mm, for various woodworking tasks. This versatile set of bits is a DIY essential for tackling a variety of DIY projects
description: This 5PC Brad Point Wood Drill Bit Set is a practical choice for everyday DIY and light woodworking jobs. The set comes with 5 popular sizes – 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm, and 10mm – giving you flexibility for a range of small projects around the home or workshop. Each bit is made from carbon steel and features a brad point tip that helps start holes cleanly, keeping the drill steady and reducing slips. Suitable for softwood, hardwood, and some plastics, these drill bits are great for common tasks such as fitting dowels, drilling pilot holes, or carrying out furniture repairs. While they’re not designed as heavy-duty trade tools, they are a cost-effective and dependable set to keep on hand for general use. Compact and versatile, this 5-piece set is a useful addition to any toolbox for both DIY enthusiasts and casual users who need straightforward, reliable drill bits.
